textPlain: Odd I’m quite old and love strategy games but for some reason have never played this one. Definitely need to buy a board and try it out. I prefer to buy high quality game boards so if any avid fans of the game have a preference please let me know.
It's finals day at the world Othello championship 2025 in Ankara, Turkey.You can watch the games on flipthedisc and watch livestreams at https://www.youtube.com/@WorldOthello/streams
